form.formComment: Back from a spell. Only had one start last preparation 7th of 10 at Sale Mdn-Sw on February 1 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Loveyamore carrying 59kg at $5. When resuming last campaign on from midfield; 3rd of 10 at Bendigo Mdn-Sw on September 17 over 1100m, on a slow track; 0.9 len behind Serinda carrying 57kg at $14. Ran 3rd in a trial at Toowoomba Inner Track over 925m on March 16. Has decent claims if presented on a song.

form.formComment: First starter by Snitzel out of French Doll purchased for AUD $ 375,000 (Inglis 2024 Australian Easter Yearling Sale). Has a total of seven trials leading in today's debut. Top barn and should be primed for a big debut run.

form.formComment: Lining up for just third start. At long odds at debut, 7th of 9 at Ipswich 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 6 over 800m, slow going 7 len behind Worthy carrying 56kg at $31. Second-up raced behind the speed prior to fading to run last of 10 at Eagle Farm 3yo F Mdn-Sw on March 25 over 1200m, 14 len behind Mercatello with 58kg at $126. Hard to see her playing a major role.
